name: rotate-in
title: RotateIn
description: A calm, spring-driven text rotation: the text settles from a slight starting angle (default -8 degrees) to 0 while fading in. No overshoot. Restraint applies to angle — the safe zone is [-12, +12] degrees.
pickWhen: a single accent moment — a quote attribution, an Easter egg. Stay inside [-12, +12] degrees.
